title: Getting Started with Pronouncly: Logging In and Selecting a Course
summary: This guide walks you through logging into Pronouncly using Google and selecting the Japanese language course to begin your learning journey.

steps.title: Google Login
steps.instruction: Click Google Login on the landing page to start authentication.
steps.narration: Click the Google login action to begin from the landing page.
steps.source_excerpt: Hey. So we are launching Pronouncely. It's an AI powered land language learning platform. So to get started, first, you need to go on the Google login button that's on the top right. Once you click it, just you you need to create an account or you can log in with the existing one.

steps.title: Continue With Google
steps.instruction: Continue with Google to move forward with the existing account sign-in flow.
steps.narration: Continue with Google to sign in with the existing account.
steps.source_excerpt: Since I've already created the account, I'll log in to the existing one. After log in, you can see the five courses. Right now, we have opened the Japan courses, and the rest of the four courses are coming soon. So under Japan click on the Japan courses. And once the Japan course has been opened so, officially, there are five
